description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check and Test that runs on every pull request. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macOS-latest with Python versions 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, and 3.9. Check out the repository, set up Python, install pipenv, install dependencies, lint with flake8, check code style with pycodestyle, check documentation style with pydocstyle, and run tests with pytest.
